entries.content: Task task-arp-001: High-confidence pass (0.92). Approach: Centralized setErrorHandler + Targeted Catches with AppError hierarchy. 10/10 checks passed.
Task task-arp-001: Fast convergence in epoch 1. Planner and Critic aligned on: Centralized setErrorHandler with AppError hierarchy is Fastify-idiomatic.

Task task-ocma-002: High-confidence pass (0.95). Pure POSIX test harness with PATH-based mocking. 38/38 tests, <1s. Key lesson: POSIX shell variable scoping is global — function-internal vars like _tmpfile clash with caller vars.
Task task-ocma-002: Fast convergence in epoch 1. Key Critic insights: set -e hazard in failure-path tests (must use subshell capture), trap EXIT for mock cleanup robustness.
